#1910 — hook envelope hookEventName

Pick a helper + the firing event. See why the old envelope was validator-rejected and what the fix emits. Block always works (rides on continue:false); only the envelope was malformed.
  

BEFORE (#1910 bug) 


    
AFTER (fix) 

  

  





  Runner guard (output-guard.mjs) strips hookEventName only for events that don't consume it; it never ADDS a missing one nor strips permissionDecision — so the old envelope failed on every event. outputBlock's fix removes the envelope entirely.
